  as={"h1"}

  children={"Get Global Metadata Keys"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/machine/{tmid}/metadata/global/key"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Lists all global metadata for the specific machine
